Amended Motion For Compensatory, Punitive Causational Damages, Fraud And Additional Claims
Off Calendar Oct-20-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ANDREA WOOD's Amended Motion For Compensatory, Punitive Causational Damages, Fraud And Additional Claims.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Andrea C. Wood's "amended motion for compensatory, punitive, causational damages, fraud, and additional claims" is off calendar. Plaintiff did not serve and file her purported motion at least 16 court days before the hearing, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b). It is also procedurally deficient on numerous other grounds, including the lack of any supporting factual declaration and the absence of any coherent legal argument supporting the relief sought. (See Cal. R. Ct. 3.1112.)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
